message:
test: pin pthread_attr_* conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_pthread_attr.rs covering 8 functions:
- pthread_attr_init / destroy: round-trip
- setdetachstate / getdetachstate: JOINABLE + DETACHED, invalid EINVAL
- setstacksize / getstacksize: 4 sizes (128k/256k/512k/2M),
  too-small EINVAL
- setguardsize / getguardsize: 3 sizes (0/4k/64k)

7 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc. Complements existing
pthread harness with the attribute-manipulation surface.

Bead: bd-pat1
